case_title: MACMURRAY PACIFIC VS. KITCHEN ART, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITCHEN ART, INC. $654.97 PRINCIPAL, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $737.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $654.97 FILED BY MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT KITCHEN ART, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($52.50 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED OCT-28-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KITCHEN ART, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EVA MCCULLOCH--CREDIT DEPT. ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGESS REPORT OF 2/27/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY KITCHEN ART, INC. IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. MEDIATED DISPOSITION", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EVA MCCULLOCH--CREDIT DEPARTMENT ASSISTANT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALI HOUREDDINI--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KITCHEN ART, INC.
